arts.ttl: Big Aston Villa injury update – Star is playing tonight
arts.sum: Emiliano Martinez will play for Aston Villa this evening despite suffering a hairline fracture in his hand last weekend. That’s according to journalist Gastón Edul, who says the Aston Villa goalkeeper is ready for the clash with Brentford. arts.sum: Villa are currently contending with a run of poor form, with their most recent outing resulting in a 3-0 Premier League defeat to Chelsea at Stamford Bridge. Aston Villa supporters have been voicing their concerns over their side's current form under Unai Emery .

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Brentford – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa host Brentford in the Premier League on Wednesday night aiming to address an alarming slump in form. Unai Emery’s side extended their winless run to eight games across all competitions at the weekend, after losing 3-0 at Chelsea. arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'take notice' after Juventus outcast offered January transfer
arts.sum: Villa have been linked with several central midfielders, not least suggestions that Fagioli’s Juventus team-mate Douglas Luiz might even return to the Second City. Aston Villa and a host of Premier League teams are ‘on red alert’ to the availability of Nicolo Fagioli.
